mapper.select: SELECT id, name, industry, region, address FROM franchises
SELECT id, franchise_id as franchiseId, month, sales, txCount, avgTicket FROM monthly_sales WHERE franchise_id = #{franchiseId} ORDER BY month ASC
SELECT f.industry, s.month, ROUND(AVG(s.sales)) as avg_sales FROM franchises f JOIN monthly_sales s ON f.id = s.franchise_id GROUP BY f.industry, s.month ORDER BY s.month ASC
SELECT f.region, s.month, ROUND(AVG(s.sales)) as avg_sales FROM franchises f JOIN monthly_sales s ON f.id = s.franchise_id GROUP BY f.region, s.month ORDER BY s.month ASC
